message:
test(dispatch): add property-based test suite for dispatch keyset resolution and mode validation

- Add proptest dev-dependency for property-based testing
- Add deterministic seed generation and structured property test logging
  infrastructure with comprehensive metadata (ts_utc, suite_id, test_id,
  seed, input/output digests, replay_command)
- Add unit tests: keyset parsing, requires_grad tracking, strict mode
  BackendSelect rejection, hardened mode fallback allowance
- Add 6 proptest property tests: known_bits roundtrip, unknown_bits
  fail-closed rejection, priority table matching, CPU requirement for
  backend resolution, autograd validation, mode-split for composite
  keysets
- Add assert_log_contract() validator for property test logging schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,5 +7,8 @@ edition = "2024"
 ft-core = { workspace = true }
 ft-kernel-cpu = { workspace = true }
 
+[dev-dependencies]
+proptest = "1.6.0"
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
